name: Tamale Pie (Quick)
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen whole kernel corn -- thawed
6 oz Corn muffin or corn bread mix plus ingredients to prepare mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Place meat in a large skillet; cook over high heat 6 to 8 minutes or until meat is no longer pink, breaking the meat apart with a wooden spoon.
3. Pour off drippings.
4. Add corn, tomatoes, olives, and seasoning mix to meat. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring constantly.
5. Pour into a deep 9-inch pie plate; smooth top with a spatula.
6. Prepare the corn muffin or corn bread mix according to package directions. Spread evenly over the meat mixture.
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Sprinkle with cheese and onions.
9. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
Serving suggestion: Serve with papaya wedges sprinkled with lime juice.
